hero.title_highlight: Building SEO-Optimized Websites & AI Business Automation
hero.description: I’m a Full-Stack Web Developer in Morocco helping startups and businesses build modern, high-performance websites, improve their SEO rankings, and automate workflows using AI tools. I also design high-converting social media ads.
hero.focus: My focus is simple: performance, scalability, and real results for growing businesses.
hero.profile_role: Full-Stack Developer, SEO Specialist & AI Automation
hero.mission: My mission is to assist startups and enterprises in creating an emotional bond between their products and satisfied, engaged customers.

web.title: Secure & SEO-Optimized Website Development
web.description: Build fast websites with modern technologies, focusing on performance, security, mobile-first design, and search engine optimization to help your business rank higher and convert visitors into clients.

systems.title: Business Automation & AI-Powered Systems
systems.description: Custom software tools, automated workflows, and AI integrations that simplify operations, reduce repetitive tasks, and help your business run faster and more efficiently.

design.title: Social Media Advertising Design
design.description: Professional ad visuals for Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok designed to clearly present your products or services, attract attention, and increase engagement and sales.

about_me.subtitle: Your partner for
about_me.paragraph1: I’m a developer and designer focused on building high-performance, SEO-optimized digital solutions that deliver real business results. My expertise is backed by a proven track record of excellence, including 1st place wins at Al Akhawayn and UM6P Ben Guerir, and 2nd place at UM6P Rabat and more. I bring this same level of precision, creativity, and commitment to every project I work on.
about_me.paragraph2: Whether you need a custom website, a business system, or eye-catching visuals for social media and ads, I focus on quality, clear communication, and results that grow your brand.

why_we_are.description: I help businesses and startups build powerful digital solutions that don’t just look good they perform, convert, and scale. Every project is designed to deliver real results and long-term value.
why_we_are.subtitle: What makes me the right partner for your success

reasons.title: Quality & Performance
reasons.description: Lightweight, fast websites and systems built with best practices and modern tech.

reasons.title: Mobile-First & SEO
reasons.description: Every project is responsive and optimized for search engines and all devices.

reasons.title: Clear Communication
reasons.description: Transparent process, regular updates, and support so you're always in the loop.

reasons.title: Trusted Results
reasons.description: Focused on delivery and client satisfaction with measurable outcomes.

projects.title: Corporate Website & SEO Growth
projects.description: Designed and developed a professional company website to showcase services and products with a strong focus on performance and SEO. The platform achieved over 2,900 new users in just 2 months thanks to fast loading speeds, optimized structure, and modern technologies.

projects.title: Business Automation Dashboard
projects.description: Built a custom dashboard to manage clients, subscriptions, and business operations in one place. Features include tracking subscription start/end dates, pricing, stock management, and automated alerts for expired services. This solution significantly improved organization, reduced manual work, and enhanced client management.

projects.title: Social Media Design & Ads
projects.description: Created high-converting social media visuals by transforming simple product images into professional marketing content. Each design includes clear messaging, branding, and call-to-action elements to increase engagement and encourage purchases across platforms like Instagram and Facebook.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Ready to start your website, system, or design project? Reach out via your preferred channel.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: What I offer
services.heading: Web Development, SEO & AI Automation Services in Morocco
services.description: From lightweight SEO-optimized websites to business automation and AI integration, and high-converting ad design — I help startups and SMBs succeed online.

web.title: Modern Web Development
web.description: Lightweight, fast websites built for search engines. I create SEO-optimized, mobile-first sites that rank well and convert visitors into customers. Ideal for businesses going online or refreshing their presence.

systems.title: Business Systems & AI
systems.description: Custom automation and AI integration to streamline operations. From workflow automation to intelligent tools, I help you save time and scale without extra overhead.

design.title: Ad & Media Design
design.description: Visual content for social media and ads that showcase your products and services. Professional creatives for Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok designed to drive engagement and sales.

reasons.title: Proven track record
reasons.text: Websites and systems that rank, convert, and scale — with real results for startups and SMBs.

reasons.title: Full-stack expertise
reasons.text: From front-end design to backend logic, SEO, and automation — one partner for your whole digital stack.

reasons.title: No lock-in
reasons.text: Clean code, standard tech, and clear documentation so you own your project and can maintain or extend it.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Your partner for digital success
about.heading: Developer & designer focused on real results
about.intro: I'm a professional developer and designer based in Morocco. I don't build for big agencies — I work with startups, medium-sized businesses, and anyone selling or promoting online who needs a strong web presence, automation, or AI in their operations.
about.paragraph1: I build lightweight, SEO-optimized websites that rank well in search engines, and I design media and ad creatives that showcase your services or products. Whether you need a new site, automation, or visuals for your social pages, I focus on quality, clear communication, and outcomes that grow your brand.
about.paragraph2: My approach combines modern tech, performance, and clarity. I help you reach more customers, automate repetitive tasks, and present your offer in a way that converts.

whoIAm.title: Who I Am
whoIAm.text: I'm Mohammed — a full-stack developer, SEO specialist, and designer with a passion for turning ideas into high-performing digital products. I work with startups and SMBs who want to stand out online: from ranking on Google to automating workflows and designing ads that convert. I believe in clean code, clear communication, and results you can measure.

storyMissionValues.title: Discover the story, mission, and values that drive me
storyMissionValues.story: My journey started with a curiosity for how the web works and how businesses can use it to grow. Over the years I've built websites, automated processes, and designed campaigns for brands that needed a partner who could both code and design — and deliver on time.
storyMissionValues.mission: My mission is to help businesses and creators build a strong, visible online presence. I want every project to be fast, findable, and focused on the user — so you can focus on what you do best while your digital presence works for you.
values: Quality over quantity — every line of code and every pixel matters.
Transparency — you're always in the loop, from kickoff to launch.
Performance — lightweight, SEO-friendly, and built to last.
Partnership — I succeed when your business grows.

howCanIHelp.title: How Can I Help?
howCanIHelp.subtitle: Ways we can work together
items: Build or redesign your website — fast, SEO-optimized, and mobile-first.
Set up automation and AI tools to save you time and scale your operations.
Design ad creatives and social media visuals that explain your offer and drive sales.
Audit and improve your existing site's speed, SEO, and conversion.
Train your team or support you with ongoing maintenance and updates.
